body.title: [dependency] Review superclaude require_api_key()/OR-var-stripping now that there are no keys
body.intention: I intend that superclaude's credential handling reflects the no-keys/browser-auth reality — the require_api_key() cred-sourcing and the ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL/AUTH_TOKEN/API_KEY stripping are simplified to only what's still needed — so the launcher doesn't carry vestigial key machinery.
body.description:
Follow-on to T-launcher-1m-default-fresh-session, surfaced 2026-07-03. superclaude's require_api_key() (bin/superclaude:103-124) sources igor.credentials.cfg + akien.credentials.cfg, and both exec paths strip ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL/AUTH_TOKEN/API_KEY (the incident_superclaude_401 OpenRouter-leak guard). With Akien on browser-auth and no keys, some of this is likely vestigial. Review: does anything superclaude launches still need a sourced key? The OR-leak strip guards against cred files exporting OpenRouter routing vars — if creds move to the single home (T-consolidate-local-secrets-one-home) and no anthropic key exists, re-scope the strip to exactly what's still required. Do NOT blindly remove the strip — verify the 401-leak can't recur first ([[incident_superclaude_401]]).

**Affected files:** bin/superclaude (require_api_key + the two env -u strip sites).
**Design rules:** compose-credentials-at-connect-time; no-live-keys-in-source.
**Scope boundary:** IN — review + simplify superclaude cred-sourcing/stripping to the no-keys reality, preserving the 401-leak guarantee. OUT — rescueclaude (its no-injected-creds contract already holds); the credential relocation itself (T-consolidate-local-secrets-one-home).
**Test plan:** no automated tests (launcher). Acceptance: a launched CC session still authenticates (browser auth) with no ANTHROPIC_* routing vars leaking to it (the 401 guard holds), and any dead cred-sourcing is removed.
**Completion criteria:** superclaude's cred handling matches the no-keys/browser-auth reality; the 401-leak guarantee is preserved and documented.
**Rollback:** git revert restores the current cred-sourcing/stripping.

[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)

[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
